choices.text: Class 1 (ATP), Class 2 (Commercial), Class 3 (Private). Duration varies by class + age. Class 1 strictest: 6 months over 40. Or BasicMed alternative for many private pilots (4 years between physician visits).

questions.explanation: 3 classes by cert level + BasicMed alternative.

choices.text: IMSAFE: Illness, Medication, Stress, Alcohol, Fatigue, Emotion. Self-ground if any issue. Plus 8-hour bottle-to-throttle (FAR 91.17). BAC ≤ 0.04%. Required by regulation + common sense.
